claim: Everyone should be aware of token limitations when using ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini
actionable: Monitor token consumption and costs when using popular LLMs in production

claim: Prompt engineering is becoming critical as the volume of AI tools increases
actionable: Learn and practice prompt engineering techniques to improve AI output quality

claim: Context engineering is an emerging field that complements prompt engineering
actionable: Apply context engineering alongside prompt engineering for better AI results

claim: Firebase Genkit can be used to build full-stack AI applications with NPM packages
actionable: Use Firebase Genkit NPM packages for full-stack AI application development

claim: AI agents are transitioning from academic interest to practical business applications
actionable: Design AI agents with business value and user needs in mind, not just technical novelty

claim: Windows AI Dev Gallery provides tools and resources for AI development
actionable: Explore Windows AI Dev Gallery for development tools and frameworks

claim: Developing AI agents requires thinking about multi-agent systems and orchestration
actionable: Study multi-agent patterns and orchestration strategies for complex AI systems

claim: Node.js applications can be extended with AI capabilities through NPM packages
actionable: Integrate AI capabilities into existing Node.js backends using NPM packages

claim: The pace of AI tool releases is accelerating, making continuous learning essential
actionable: Set up regular learning routines to stay current with AI developments

claim: Tone and context vary by platform (WhatsApp vs web) and AI systems should adapt
actionable: Design AI systems with platform-specific tone and context awareness
